query: INSERT INTO current (workspace_id, skill_id, commit_id, epoch, seq, signed_record, updated_at) VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5, ?6, ?7) ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, skill_id) DO UPDATE SET commit_id = excluded.commit_id, epoch = excluded.epoch, seq = excluded.seq, signed_record = excluded.signed_record, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
